criteria.description: The Hero and Journey start path no longer expose an SBTI gate, and the Task 1-5 simulation can start directly from the landing page CTA.
criteria.notes: The Hero no longer renders an SBTI input or assessment entry, Journey start no longer checks a prerequisite field, and the integration suite verifies the watch CTA launches the simulation directly.

criteria.description: The narrative and task model have been collapsed back to Task 1-5, with no visible Agent SBTI finale or Task 6 copy remaining in the product surface.
criteria.notes: Task identifiers now stop at task-5, Journey copy references Task 1-5, and unit coverage verifies the branded task order no longer appends an SBTI finale.

criteria.description: The in-app SBTI assessment, local question bank, scoring engine, persona images, and dedicated SBTI tests have been removed cleanly without breaking the build.
criteria.evidence: git diff removes src/components/sbti/**, src/content/sbti/**, src/lib/sbti/**, public/sbti/images/**, tests/unit/sbtiEngine.test.ts + npm run test + npm run build
criteria.notes: The repo no longer ships SBTI-only assets or logic, and final verification completed with 30 passing tests plus a successful Vite build.
